description: Local-first, source-traceable agent memory — no LLM at ingest, fully offline
name: io.github.vornicx/midas

environmentVariables.description: Path to a SQLite file to persist memory across restarts (default: in-memory)
environmentVariables.name: MIDAS_MCP_DB

environmentVariables.description: Embedding backend: 'local' (bge ONNX, offline) or 'hashing' (default: local)
environmentVariables.name: MIDAS_MCP_EMBEDDER

environmentVariables.description: Cap the store; above it the lowest-value memories are auto-forgotten (no LLM)
environmentVariables.name: MIDAS_MCP_MAX_RECORDS

environmentVariables.description: Relevance floor 1-5 for auto-capture; turns scoring below it are skipped
environmentVariables.name: MIDAS_MCP_MIN_IMPORTANCE

title: Midas
